name: Falsification-Based Verification of LLM-Generated Optimization Models: Sound Test Batteries and Their Detection Limits

description: arXiv:2607.16646v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models now translate natural-language descriptions of decision problems into solver-ready optimization models, but they fail silently. A generated model often runs and still formulates the wrong problem. This paper develops a theory of falsification-based verification for this setting. Every numeric quantity in the description is...
author: Haifeng Li, Mo Hai
